title: Oversee compliance with an organic certification scheme
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Oversee compliance with an organic certification scheme demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.
